title: Report Yatim khana Arya Samaj, Ferozepore
gloss: The annual report on the Orphanage at Ferozepore for the year 1909.
notes: Arya Samaj orphanage report — counterpart to the Muslim orphanage report at p35 s111.

title: Risala-i-Quwwat-i-Khayal, also entitled Tehzib-ul-Khasal
gloss: A translation by Mufti Muhammad Anwar-ul-Haq of Ralph Waldo Trine's 'Character Building.'
publisher: The translator, who is Chief Secretary and Secretary of Education in the Bhopal State
notes: American New Thought (R. W. Trine) translated by a Bhopal State official — trans-imperial self-help circulation.

author: Sada Nand, Gosain
title: Din Chariya
gloss: A small pamphlet containing admonitions of general application.
publisher: Lala Sita Ram and Sain Das, Cloth Merchants
notes: Published by cloth merchants — devotional patronage by traders.

title: Salana Report Sanatan Dharam Sabha, Hoshiarpur, babat 1909-1910
gloss: Annual Report of the Sanatan Dharam Sabha (orthodox Hindu association) of Hoshiárpur for 1909-1910.
publisher: Ajudhiya Prashad, B. A., Secretary of the Sabha

title: Salana Report Teachar's Association Madaras Vernacular, Zila Kangra babat san 1909-1910
gloss: Annual Report of the Teachers' Association of Vernacular Schools in the Kangra district for 1909-1910.
publisher: Sri Ram, First Teacher, Kangath, Tahsil Núrpur, Kángra district, Secretary of the Association
notes: District teachers' association — compare Lahore counterpart at p32 s83.

author: Satya Dev Mahashaya, formerly Ghulam Haidar, Maulvi
title: Nara-i-Haidari, Hissa-i-Awal
gloss: A controversial booklet directed against Islam, Part I.
notes: Author a convert from Islam to Arya Samaj (name change recorded in catalog); anti-Islam polemic, 3rd edition, 4,000 copies — shuddhi-era controversy literature.

author: Sataya Dhari, M.
title: Dharam Tract No. 1
gloss: A small pamphlet on religion as a general term.
